articles.title: Community Thrift Shop
articles.excerpt: Please consider donating your pre-loved items to the Community Thrift Shop in Midland Park.

articles.title: Bible Study
articles.excerpt: Bible Study on Wednesday Nights via Zoom at 8 pm. Open to all ages.

articles.title: Communion Sundays
articles.excerpt: The first Sunday of each month we receive the Sacrament of Holy Communion.

articles.title: Healing Sundays
articles.excerpt: Healing Sunday is every 3rd Sunday of each month at our 10am service.

articles.title: Prayer Requests & Pastoral Visits
articles.excerpt: If you or a family member are hospitalized, please call the office to arrange a pastoral visit.

articles.title: Lenten Events
articles.excerpt: Pot-Luck Lunches and Exploring Fruit and Gifts of the Spirit series.

articles.title: Introducing Our Interim Pastor
articles.excerpt: I'm Rev. Mark William Ennis. God called me to ministry when I was four years old.

articles.title: A Reflection on a Year of Service
articles.excerpt: This year I have had the honor of recording the church services and streaming them online.
